transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Thank you for calling PhysicsWallah. This is Priya, how can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Hi Priya! Main NEET ki preparation kar rahi hun aur main apne courses ke baare mein jaanna chahti hun. Kya aap mujhe bata sakti hain ki kya options available hain?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul! Main aapki help kar sakti hun. Pehle aap mujhe apna naam bata dijiye aur aap currently kaun se class mein hain?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Mera naam Ananya Reddy hai aur main Class 12 mein hun. Main Hyderabad se hun.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great Ananya! Toh aap NEET 2025 ke liye prepare kar rahi hain ya next year ke liye? Matlab kitne months hain aapke paas exam tak?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Actually main NEET 2025 ke liye kar rahi hun aur sirf 4 months left hain. Isliye main thoda worried hun ki itne kam time mein kya proper preparation ho payegi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Don't worry Ananya! 4 months mein bhi acchi preparation ho sakti hai agar right guidance aur strategy ho. Hamare paas NEET Yakeen 2027 course hai jo comprehensive hai, lekin aapke liye main suggest karungi ki hum current batch mein enroll karein. Kya aapka budget fix hai ya flexible hai?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Budget ke liye main worry nahi kar rahi, quality education mil jaaye bas. Aur main khud decide kar sakti hun, parents ne already permission de diya hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect! Toh main aapko recommend karungi NEET Yakeen course. Isme live classes, recorded lectures, doubt solving sessions, aur regular tests sab included hai. Price hai 33999 rupees, lekin hum 0% EMI bhi offer karte hain 3299 rupees per month mein.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Ye toh reasonable hai. Kya isme crash course format mein intense preparation hogi? Kyunki mujhe lagta hai main already late hun.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Haan bilkul! Hamare teachers specially short duration ke liye strategy banate hain. High-yield topics pe focus karenge, previous year questions solve karenge, aur weekly mock tests honge. Alok Sir aur other experienced teachers handle karte hain ye batches.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Sounds perfect! Main interested hun. Kya main study material physical form mein bhi milega ya sirf online hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ananya, aapko dono milega! Online access toh immediate mil jaayega, aur physical books bhi courier se 3-4 days mein deliver ho jaayengi. Plus mobile app mein offline download kar sakti hain lectures.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Excellent! I want to start immediately — what is the fastest way to enroll? Main aaj hi shuru karna chahti hun preparation.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great decision Ananya! Main abhi aapka enrollment process start kar deti hun. Aap PW Pay se payment kar sakti hain, ya fir EMI option choose kar sakti hain. Kya prefer karogi?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Main full payment kar dungi. EMI ki zarurat nahi. Aap process bata dijiye, main ready hun.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect! Main aapko payment link share kar rahi hun WhatsApp pe. Aapka mobile number confirm kar dijiye - aur payment complete hone ke baad immediately access mil jaayega. Koi aur questions hain?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Mobile number hai 9 8 7 6 5 4 3 2 1 0. Bas ek question - agar koi doubt ho toh teachers directly accessible hain?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Haan bilkul! Doubt solving sessions daily hote hain aur app mein doubt section hai where you can post questions. Teachers 24 hours mein respond karte hain. Main abhi link send kar rahi hun aapke number pe.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Thank you so much Priya! Aap bahut helpful hain. Main payment kar dungi aur aaj se hi start kar dungi. Really excited hun!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're most welcome Ananya! Main sure hun aap accha perform karogi. Payment ke baad welcome call bhi ayega orientation ke liye. All the best for your NEET preparation! Koi bhi help chahiye toh call kar dena.

promised_actions: Send course details and enrollment link

slack_message.preview: 🔥 HOT lead: Ananya Reddy, NEET, Class 12, Hyderabad. High intent, ready to enroll. Immediate callback recommended.

email.subject: Your NEET Preparation Plan — PhysicsWallah
email.preview: Hi Ananya, it was great speaking with you today! Based on your preparation goals, I've put together a personalized plan for your NEET journey.

crm_record.notes: High engagement, self decision-maker. Likely to convert with one follow-up call.
